mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT productNo, productName, productDescription, productPrice, productUpdated, (SELECT imageFilename FROM image WHERE articleNo = productNo AND imageType = 'žÉĀŪíą' ORDER BY imageNo ASC LIMIT 1) AS imageFileName FROM ( SELECT productNo, productName, productDescription, productPrice, productUpdated, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY productName ORDER BY productUpdated DESC) AS rn FROM product ) sub WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY productUpdated DESC ) final LIMIT 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT b.boardMyhomeArticleNo, b.boardMyhomeTitle, b.memberId, b.boardMyhomeLikes, b.boardMyhomeViews, b.boardMyhomeUpdated, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply r WHERE r.boardMyhomeArticleNo = b.boardMyhomeArticleNo) AS totalReply, (SELECT imageFilename FROM image WHERE articleNo = b.boardMyhomeArticleNo AND imageType = 'žĽ§Ž≤Ą' ORDER BY imageNo ASC LIMIT 1) AS imageFileName FROM boardMyhome b ORDER BY b.boardMyhomeLikes DESC ) final LIMIT 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.productNo, t.productName, t.productDescription, t.productPrice, t.imageFileName, t.totalOrderQty, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.productName ORDER BY t.totalOrderQty DESC) AS rn FROM ( SELECT p.productNo, p.productName, p.productDescription, p.productPrice, (SELECT imageFilename FROM image WHERE articleNo = p.productNo AND imageType = 'žÉĀŪíą' ORDER BY imageNo ASC LIMIT 1) AS imageFileName, COALESCE(SUM(oj.orderQty), 0) AS totalOrderQty FROM product p LEFT JOIN ordersJoin oj ON p.productNo = oj.productNo GROUP BY p.productNo, p.productName, p.productDescription, p.productPrice ) t ) sub WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY totalOrderQty DESC ) final LIMIT 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.productNo, p.productName, p.productDescription, p.productPrice, p.productUpdated, (SELECT imageFilename FROM image WHERE articleNo = p.productNo AND imageType = 'žÉĀŪíą' ORDER BY imageNo ASC LIMIT 1) AS imageFileName, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.productName ORDER BY p.productUpdated DESC) AS rn FROM product p WHERE UPPER(p.productName) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(p.productDescription) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' ) sub WHERE rn = 1

SELECT b.boardMyhomeArticleNo, b.boardMyhomeTitle, b.boardMyhomeContents AS productDescription, NULL AS productPrice, b.boardMyhomeUpdated, (SELECT imageFilename FROM image WHERE articleNo = b.boardMyhomeArticleNo AND imageType = 'žĽ§Ž≤Ą' ORDER BY imageNo ASC LIMIT 1) AS imageFileName, b.memberId, m.memberNickName, b.boardMyhomeLikes, b.boardMyhomeViews, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply WHERE boardMyhomeArticleNo = b.boardMyhomeArticleNo) AS totalReply FROM boardMyhome b JOIN member m ON b.memberId = m.memberId WHERE UPPER(b.boardMyhomeTitle) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'

SELECT suggestion FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(productName, '<[^>]*>', '') AS suggestion FROM product WHERE UPPER(REGEXP_REPLACE(productName, '<[^>]*>', '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' UNION SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(boardMyhomeTitle, '<[^>]*>', '') AS suggestion FROM boardMyhome WHERE UPPER(REGEXP_REPLACE(boardMyhomeTitle, '<[^>]*>', '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' ) final ORDER BY suggestion
